prompt: Dark cinematic reveal: glowing purple light sweeps across a deep navy background, bold Chinese text emerges with dramatic lens flare, premium typography animates in — 'Quantify every trade with probability math.'
Sleek smartphone floats on dark surface, close-up shot slowly pushes in as a finger taps the price field and types '42,500', soft purple glow pulses around the active input field.
Smartphone screen fills frame, expected value result dramatically counts up in glowing white numerals, purple accent highlights flash across the interface, camera pulls back with cinematic bokeh.
